title: Ubiquiti UACC-Pro-AP-AM - Wall mount for U6-Pro and UAP-AC-PRO
description: The plastic wall holder is intended for horizontal installation of Access Points from Ubiquiti, specifically for U6-Pro and UAP-AC-PRO . The holder is attached to the wall using two screws and dowels, which are included in the package. The overall dimensions of the holder are 174 x 189 x 30 mm
